---
title: "Course Schedule" 
---

This page includes schedule for the Spring 2026 semester, along with all the assigned readings and graded events.

*OpenIntro Statistics* and *Introduction to Modern Statistics* are both available as a free e-book. They can be downloaded from the links in the course letter, or they can be found in the course Teams page.

## Block 1: Probability Models

+--------+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------+
| Lesson | Topic                                   | BEFORE Class                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | Graded Events (due dates)       |

| 1      | Intro to Data Science and Generative AI |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                 |
+--------+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------+
| 2      | Intro to Probability                    | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                 |
|        |                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                 |
|        |                                         |     -   Section 3.1 Defining Probability, *OpenIntro Statistics*                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                 |
|        |                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                 |
|        |                                         | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 2](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/3233b224-a086-4aeb-8bb5-1412444f7ee9){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                          |                                 |
+--------+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------+
| 3      | Conditional Probability, Bayes' Rule    | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | -   Pre-course AI Questionnaire |
|        |                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | -   Group Preferences Form      |
|        |                                         |     -   Section 3.2 Conditional Probability, *OpenIntro Statistics*                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                 |
|        |                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                 |
|        |                                         | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 3](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/06a6c546-6916-40cb-a710-a469f0842121){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                          |                                 |
+--------+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------+
| 4      | Discrete Random Variables               | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | -   HW1 Concept Check           |
|        |                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | -   HW1 Core Competencies       |
|        |                                         |     -   Section 10.2 Random variables (Intro through 10.2.4), [*Computational Probability and Statistics*](https://ds-usafa.github.io/Quarto-Book/Discrete-Random-Variables.html){target="_blank"}                                                      |                                 |
|        |                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                 |
|        |                                         |     -   Section 3.4 (Intro through 3.4.2) Random Variables, *OpenIntro Statistics*                                                                                                                                                                      |                                 |
|        |                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                 |
|        |                                         | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 4](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/08abf03d-1d2d-4f78-9447-7c1d115dbf69){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                          |                                 |
+--------+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------+
| 5      | Continuous Random Variables             | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                 |
|        |                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                 |
|        |                                         |     -   Section 11.2 Continuous random variables (Intro through 11.2.2) and 11.3 Moments, [*Computational Probability and Statistics*](https://ds-usafa.github.io/Quarto-Book/Continuous-Random-Variables.html){target="_blank"}                        |                                 |
|        |                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                 |
|        |                                         |     -   Section 3.5 Continuous distributions, *OpenIntro Statistics*                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                 |
|        |                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                 |
|        |                                         | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 5](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/c18d08c7-f192-4790-96ec-fd32137e30e8){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                          |                                 |
+--------+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------+
| 6      | Discrete Named Distributions            | -   READ: Sections 4.2 Geometric distribution, 4.3 Binomial distribution (through 4.3.1), and 4.5 Poisson distribution, *OpenIntro Statistics*                                                                                                          | -   Project Individual Task #1  |
|        |                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                 |
|        |                                         | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 6](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/5aeb5c88-de9a-435b-b93f-4d3a6481e74c){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                          |                                 |
+--------+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------+
| 7      | Continuous Named Distributions          | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | -   HW2 Concept Check           |
|        |                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | -   HW2 Core Competencies       |
|        |                                         |     -   Section 4.1 Normal Distribution, *OpenIntro Statistics*                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                 |
|        |                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                 |
|        |                                         |     -   [Section 13.2.1 Uniform distribution and 13.2.2 Exponential distribution](https://ds-usafa.github.io/Quarto-Book/Named-Continuous-Distributions.html#exponential-distribution){target="_blank"} from *Computational Probability and Statistics* |                                 |
|        |                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                 |
|        |                                         | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 7](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/3e74f22c-0af6-4afe-b5e7-d771b0a01990){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                          |                                 |
+--------+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------+

 

## Block 2: Understanding Data

+--------+--------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------+
| Lesson | Topic                                            | BEFORE Class                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Graded Events (due dates)      |

| 8      | Data Basics                                      | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |     -   Chapter 1 Hello data from *Introduction to Modern Stats* *(2e)*                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |     -   Chapter 5 Exploring numerical data from *Introduction to Modern Stats* *(2e)*                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |     -   ***Note: You may not be able to access the web-native version of Intro to Modern Stats (2nd edition) on MissionNet WiFi. Please use the provided PDF of the textbook (in Teams) or refer to the PDF of the assigned reading in NotebookLM.***                                                                                                          |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 8](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/6f92eaad-f39d-44fa-802a-fc4496e533ea){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------+
| 9      | GR1                                              | Study! Practice!                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  | -   [**Block 1 NotebookLM Study Guide**](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/8187bc92-1afc-472d-8448-d1c29558174b){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                |
|        |                                                  | -   GR1 will take place on Thursday 29 January (M9) during the common GR time, starting at 0630                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  | -   There will be no regular class on M9/T9                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------+
| 10     | Data Collection and Studies                      | -   READ: Chapter 2 Study design from *Introduction to Modern Stats (2e)*                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | -   Project Group Task #1      |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 10](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/725f1277-edc9-4935-800d-01e8d6eb4b25){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------+
| 11     | Tidy Data                                        | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |     -   [Chapter 4 Data Importing and Tidy Data](https://moderndive.com/v2/tidy.html) from *Modern Dive*                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |     -   Complete the [Language of Data interactive lab](https://openintro.shinyapps.io/ims-01-data-01/) from *OpenIntro* - read through the interactive lab and do your best to understand this introduction to how we'll utilize R as a tool for data wrangling and numerical and visual summaries throughout this block                                      |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |         -   On the Submit page, click the Generate button to generate a hash code that shows you completed the interactive lab. You'll copy/paste this into the reading guide for Lesson 11.                                                                                                                                                                   |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 11](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/c15d1e56-d2a1-42f9-9cc3-174b52c7ebe6){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------+
| 12     | Data Wrangling                                   | -   READ: [Chapter 3 Data Wrangling](https://moderndive.com/v2/wrangling.html){target="_blank"} from *Modern Dive*                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -   HW3 Concept Check          |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | -   HW3 Core Competencies      |
|        |                                                  | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 12](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/f3226153-1b7b-4766-af0f-bd472099e7fb){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------+
| 13     | Numerical Summaries                              | -   READ: Chapter 5 Exploring Numerical Data from *Introduction to Modern Statistics* - beginning through Section 5.6                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  | -   Complete the interactive lab, [Exploratory Data Analysis: 3 - Numerical Summaries](https://openintro.shinyapps.io/ims-02-explore-03/){target="_blank"} from *Introduction to Modern Statistics*                                                                                                                                                            |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 13](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/71ff8b24-dce4-48e0-8ada-a497edc42929){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------+
| 14     | Five Named Graphs / Data Visualization in 2D     | -   READ: [Chapter 2 Data Visualization](https://moderndive.com/v2/viz.html){target="_blank"} from *Modern Dive*                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | -   Project Individual Task #2 |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 14](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/1b0e9821-3ed8-4e1c-8394-e6a0160d2cd5){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------+
| 15     | Data Visualization in 1D / Centrality and Spread | -   READ: Chapter 6 Applications: Explore from *Introduction to Modern Statistics*                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -   HW4 Concept Check          |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | -   HW4 Core Competencies      |
|        |                                                  | -   Complete TWO interactive labs from *Introduction to Modern Statistics*:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |     -   [Exploratory Data Analysis: 1 - Exploring categorical data](https://openintro.shinyapps.io/ims-02-explore-01/){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |     -   [Exploratory Data Analysis: 2 - Exploring numerical data](https://openintro.shinyapps.io/ims-02-explore-02/){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  | -   Reading Guide for Lesson 15 (Gradescope only, no NotebookLM)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |     -   Find examples of news articles, social media headlines, briefings, or official USAFA or CW communication where statistics "pop" up. Is there a moment when you suspect the communication is referring to a mean or a median? Are there references to "spread"? If so, what kind? What data visualizations did you encounter?                           |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |         -   Look for examples of/references to measures of centrality in a news article, social media post, briefing, or official USAFA communication.                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |         -   Look for examples of/references to measures of spread in a news article, social media post, briefing, or official USAFA communication.                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |         -   Look for data visualizations in a news article, social media post, briefing, or official USAFA communication.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |     -   Complete the interactive lab, [Exploratory Data Analysis: 4 - Case study](https://openintro.shinyapps.io/ims-02-explore-04) from *Introduction to Modern Statistics*                                                                                                                                                                                   |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  | -   Reading Guide for Lesson 16 (Gradescope only, no NotebookLM)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------+
| 16     | Data Provenance / History of Stats               | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |     -   Azar, B. (2010, May 1). Are your findings 'WEIRD'? *Monitor on Psychology*, *41*(5). <https://www.apa.org/monitor/2010/05/weird> (\~2 minute read)                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |         -   OPTIONAL: Original study can be found here: Henrich J, Heine SJ, Norenzayan A. The weirdest people in the world? *Behavioral and Brain Sciences*. 2010;33(2-3):61-83. [doi:10.1017/S0140525X0999152X](https://www.cambridge.org/core/journals/behavioral-and-brain-sciences/article/weirdest-people-in-the-world/BF84F7517D56AFF7B7EB58411A554C17) |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |         AND                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |     -   **Choose ONE of the following to watch**. Feel free to watch on a faster speed, but please engage with the material in a meaningful way:                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |         -   [TED Talk](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_2u_eHHzRto){target="_blank"} by Cathy O'Neil, "The era of blind faith in big data must end":                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |         -   Introduction to the "Gender Shades" [study](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TWWsW1w-BVo){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |             -   Associated [paper](https://proceedings.mlr.press/v81/buolamwini18a/buolamwini18a.pdf) for those interested                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |         -   [Summary video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aZarigloqXc){target="_blank"} of the "Man is to Computer Programmer as Woman is to Homemaker" study:                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |             -   Associated [paper](https://proceedings.neurips.cc/paper_files/paper/2016/file/a486cd07e4ac3d270571622f4f316ec5-Paper.pdf) for those interested                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |         AND                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |     -   **Choose ONE of the following to read**. We know some of these are a bit long, but please engage with the material in a meaningful way! Feel free to utilize NotebookLM/ChatGPT for help in reading one of these articles:                                                                                                                             |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |         -   Evans, Richard J. 2020. “RA Fisher and the Science of Hatred.” 28 July 2020. *New Statesman*. <https://www.newstatesman.com/long-reads/2020/07/ra-fisher-and-science-hatred>.                                                                                                                                                                      |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |         -   Langkjaer-Bain, Robert. 2019. “The Troubling Legacy of Francis Galton.” June 2019. *Significance*. <https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1740-9713.2019.01275.x>.                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  |         -   Levy, Ido. 2019. “Eugenics and the Ethics of Statistical Analysis.” 16 December 2019. *Georgetown Public Policy Review*. <https://gppreview.com/2019/12/16/eugenics-ethics-statistical-analysis/>.                                                                                                                                                 |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  | -   Reading Guide for Lesson 17 (Gradescope only, no NotebookLM)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------+
| 17     | GR2                                              | Study! Practice!                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                |
|        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                |
|        |                                                  | -   [**Block 2 NotebookLM Study Guide**](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/9c0bbb0e-1b74-42d7-8a4e-d84fe82ceae5){target="_blank"}                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                |
|        |                                                  | -   GR2 will take place on Thursday 26 February (T18) during the common GR time, starting at 0630                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                |
|        |                                                  | -   There will be no regular class on M18/T18                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------+

 

## Block 3: Statistical Inference

+----------+--------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
| Lesson   | Topic                                                  | BEFORE Class                                                                                                                                                                           | Graded Events (due dates)                           |

| 18       | Sampling Framework                                     | -   READ: [Chapter 7 Sampling from *Modern Dive*](https://moderndive.com/v2/sampling.html) - skip Section 7.3 but read the rest of the chapter                                         | -   Course Participation Form (Prog)                |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 19](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/90e79303-bb46-482e-a2fb-a8f5e4c1d320){target="_blank"}                                                        |                                                     |
+----------+--------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
| 19       | Bootstrap and Resampling                               | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                              |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |     -   [Chapter 8 Estimation, Confidence Intervals and Bootstrapping](https://moderndive.com/v2/confidence-intervals.html){target="_blank"} from *ModernDive*                         |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |         -   Read the start of the chapter through the end of Section 8.1.1                                                                                                             |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |         -   Read Section 8.2 through the end of Section 8.2.1                                                                                                                          |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |     -   Chapter 12 Confidence intervals with bootstrapping from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                               |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |         -   Read the start of the chapter through the end of Section 12.1                                                                                                              |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 20](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/dbe1bbf8-4bbd-43ec-a956-a51d8cbf8c2c){target="_blank"}                                                        |                                                     |
+----------+--------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
| 20       | Confidence Intervals                                   | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                              | -   Project Group Task #2                           |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |     -   [Chapter 8 Estimation, Confidence Intervals and Bootstrapping](https://moderndive.com/v2/confidence-intervals.html){target="_blank"} from *ModernDive*                         | -   Group Member Evaluation (Prog)                  |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |         -   Sections 8.1.2 and 8.1.3                                                                                                                                                   |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |         -   Sections 8.2.2, 8.2.3, and 8.2.4                                                                                                                                           |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |     -   Chapter 12 Confidence intervals with bootstrapping from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                               |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |         -   Sections 12.2 through 12.4                                                                                                                                                 |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 21](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/2295503e-94b5-48ae-a2e7-ef6559c055df){target="_blank"}                                                        |                                                     |
+----------+--------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
| 21       | Interpreting Confidence Intervals                      | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                              | -   HW5 Concept Check                               |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        | -   HW5 Core Competencies                           |
|          |                                                        |     -   [Chapter 8 Estimation, Confidence Intervals and Bootstrapping](https://moderndive.com/v2/confidence-intervals.html){target="_blank"} from *ModernDive*                         |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |         -   Section 8.1.5 and Section 8.4 through the end of the chapter                                                                                                               |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 22](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/cab5ceee-5461-4999-888d-5af5993dc4cd){target="_blank"}                                                        |                                                     |
+----------+--------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
| 22       | Null and Alternative Hypotheses, p-values              | -   READ: Chapter 11 Hypothesis Testing with Randomization from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                               |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 23](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/ea0504e3-9e9e-48be-992e-23e0286870f3){target="_blank"}                                                        |                                                     |
+----------+--------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
| 23       | Hypothesis Testing (difference of proportions & means) | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                              | -   Specialty Standard #1                           |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |     -   Chapter 11 Hypothesis Testing with Randomization from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)* - YES, read it again!                                                           |                                                     |
