|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |     -   Chapter 17 Inference for comparing two proportions from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                               |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |         -   Sections 17.1 and 17.2 only                                                                                                                                                |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |     -   Chapter 20 Inference for comparing two independent means from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                         |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |         -   Beginning of the chapter through Section 20.2 only                                                                                                                         |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 24](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/cc44a0ef-6741-412e-a8b1-ddd46ac043c9){target="_blank"}                                                        |                                                     |
+----------+--------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
| 24       | Hypothesis Testing (single proportion & mean)          | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                              |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |     -   Chapter 16 Inference for a Single Proportion from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                     |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |         -   Beginning of the chapter through section 16.1                                                                                                                              |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |     -   Chapter 19 Inference for a Single Mean from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                           |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |         -   Beginning of the chapter through section 19.1                                                                                                                              |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |     -   Chapter 11 Hypothesis Testing with Randomization from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)* - continue to review!                                                           |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 25](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/69148b11-0d71-4196-9acb-eb9bd975fdb1){target="_blank"}                                                        |                                                     |
+----------+--------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
| 25       | Type I & II errors, Significance                       | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                              | -   HW6 Concept Check                               |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        | -   HW6 Core Competencies                           |
|          |                                                        |     -   Chapter 14 Decision Errors from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                       |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |         -   Sections 14.0 through 14.5                                                                                                                                                 |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |     -   [The ASA Statement on p-values: Context, Process, and Purpose](https://amstat.tandfonline.com/doi/epdf/10.1080/00031305.2016.1154108?needAccess=true){target="_blank"} article |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |     -   Chapter 11 Hypothesis Testing with Randomization from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)* - continue to review!                                                           |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 26](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/b824b17f-001f-47be-a0c9-503cd92b0175){target="_blank"}                                                        |                                                     |
+----------+--------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
| 26       | Project - Mentor and Peer Feedback Day                 | -   Make sure you have your group's mentor feedback ready to use in-class on Lesson 27                                                                                                 | -   Project - Mentor Feedback Form                  |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        | -   Project - Peer Feedback Form (Reading Guide 26) |
|          |                                                        |     -   Come to class prepared to review other groups' projects and provide feedback                                                                                                   |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        | -   NO Reading Guide                                                                                                                                                                   |                                                     |
+----------+--------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
| 27       | GR3                                                    | Study! Practice!                                                                                                                                                                       |                                                     |
|          |                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                     |
|          |                                                        | -   [**Block 3 NotebookLM Study Guide**](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/6a0870b7-5749-47ac-a9f2-d068cf93f702)                                                                  |                                                     |
|          |                                                        | -   GR3 will take place on Wednesday 1 April (M28) during the common GR time, starting at 0630                                                                                         |                                                     |
|          |                                                        | -   There will be no regular class on M28/T28                                                                                                                                          |                                                     |
+----------+--------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+

 

## Block 4: Linear Regression and the Central Limit Theorem

+---------+----------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+
| Lesson  | Topic                                                    | BEFORE Class                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Graded Events (due dates)             |

| 28      | Linear Regression, Correlation, and Predictions          | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 7 Linear regression with a single predictor from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                                    |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Beginning of the chapter through the end of Section 7.2                                                                                                                                                          |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   SKIP Section 7.1.3 Residuals                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   SKIP Section 7.2.4-7.2.5                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 29](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/5c4013fc-79f7-4c55-b7b7-80be8186dbf1){target="_blank"}                                                                                              |                                       |
+---------+----------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+
| 29      | R-squared, Outliers, and Residuals                       | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -   Project Individual Task #3        |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 7 Linear regression with a single predictor from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                                    |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Sections 7.1.3, 7.2.4, and 7.2.5                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Sections 7.3 and 7.4                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Review the rest of Chapter 7 (from Lesson 29 assigned reading) as well                                                                                                                                           |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   SUPPLEMENTAL (same regression content but with some additional help for coding) - [Chapter 5 Simple Linear Regression from *ModernDive*](https://moderndive.com/v2/regression.html#regression)                       |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 30](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/21876e79-e810-4c85-9aed-21adc8b527e2){target="_blank"}                                                                                              |                                       |
+---------+----------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+
| 30      | Train-test Paradigm, Overfitting, and Adjusted R-squared | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 24 Inference for regression with a single predictor from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                            |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Section 24.6                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 10 Inference for regression from *Modern Dive*                                                                                                                                                               |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   [Section 10.2.6](https://moderndive.com/v2/inference-for-regression.html#model-fit){target="_blank"}                                                                                                             |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 8 Linear regression with multiple predictors from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                                   |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Section 8.3, skim Section 8.4                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 31](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/05058660-93d9-43b5-b3a5-9d751c74666b){target="_blank"}                                                                                              |                                       |
+---------+----------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+
| 31      | Multiple Regression (parallel slopes)                    | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 8 Linear regression with multiple predictors from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                                   |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Feel free to review Section 7.2.6 as well                                                                                                                                                                        |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   [Chapter 6 Multiple Regression from *ModernDive*](https://moderndive.com/v2/multiple-regression.html#multiple-regression){target="_blank"} (beginning of the chapter through Section 6.1.4)                          |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Pay special attention to Section 6.1.3 Model without interactions                                                                                                                                                |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 32](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/558a91f4-ad3c-43be-898a-5be8f71e3fce){target="_blank"}                                                                                              |                                       |
+---------+----------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+
| 32      | Multiple Regression (interaction), Simpson's Paradox     | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -   HW7 Concept Check                 |
|         |                                                          |     -   [Chapter 6 Multiple Regression from *ModernDive*](https://moderndive.com/v2/multiple-regression.html#multiple-regression){target="_blank"} (beginning of the chapter through Section 6.1.4)                          | -   HW7 Core Competencies             |
|         |                                                          |         -   Pay special attention to Section 6.1.2 Model with interactions                                                                                                                                                   |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 3 Applications: Data from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                                                           |                                       |
|         |                                                          | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 33](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/fe2919a4-12c7-47de-bfc5-0f73f45c6593){target="_blank"}                                                                                              |                                       |
+---------+----------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+
| 33      | Simulation-based Inference for Regression                | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -   Project Group Task #3             |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 24 Inference for linear regression with a single predictor from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                     |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 25 Inference for linear regression with multiple predictors from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                    |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Beginning of the chapter through Section 25.2                                                                                                                                                                    |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 34](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/a4c77a5e-ba44-420a-b3c7-f6541e81b284)                                                                                                               |                                       |
+---------+----------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+
| 34      | Central Limit Theorem and t-statistics                   | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -   Specialty Standard #2             |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 13 Inference with mathematical models from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                                          |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Read Section 13.1 Central Limit Theorem                                                                                                                                                                          |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 19 Inference for a single mean from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                                                 |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Read Section 19.2 Mathematical model for a mean                                                                                                                                                                  |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Watch the [Bunnies and Dragons](https://youtu.be/jvoxEYmQHNM?si=iQUveQq9KxD7D5nk) video                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 36](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/179fb909-e21d-44de-abef-da761dacfb32)                                                                                                               |                                       |
+---------+----------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+
| 35      | Diagnostics and Classical Inference with t-distributions | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 19 Inference for a single mean from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                                                 |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Review (from last lesson) Section 19.2 Mathematical model for a mean (especially 19.2.4 and 19.2.5)                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 20 Inference for comparing two independent means from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                               |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Section 20.3 Mathematical model for testing the difference in means                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Section 20.4 Mathematical model for estimating the difference in means                                                                                                                                           |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 16 Inference for a single proportion from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                                           |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Section 16.2 Mathematical model for a proportion                                                                                                                                                                 |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 17 Inference for comparing two proportions from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                                     |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Section 17.3 Mathematical model for the difference in proportions                                                                                                                                                |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 37](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/b62f48c8-1c1e-4bf4-9e7d-26d4196d5d95)                                                                                                               |                                       |
+---------+----------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+
| 36      | Multiple testing, p-hacking                              | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -   HW8 Concept Check                 |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | -   HW8 Core Competencies             |
|         |                                                          |     -   [Multiple Comparisons](https://www.biostathandbook.com/multiplecomparisons.html) from the *Handbook of Biological Statistics*                                                                                        |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   The section on Post-hoc testing in [this interactive tutorial](https://openintro.shinyapps.io/ims-05-infer-08/#section-post-hoc-testing)                                                                             |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   A quick definition of the [Bonferroni Correction](https://mathworld.wolfram.com/BonferroniCorrection.html) from Wolfram MathWorld                                                                                    |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Lies, Damn Lies, and Statistics - [a video explaining p-hacking](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Et9pORQHR2A) (watch the beginning through 10:52; stop when we transitions to talking about the Python code example) |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   OPTIONAL, if you're able to access this website from USAFA: [How do you know a paper is legit?](https://callingbullshit.org/tools/tools_legit.html) from *Calling Bullshit*                                          |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 35](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/9b682fdf-8953-4dc5-a2f5-b1bd502ef81a)                                                                                                               |                                       |
+---------+----------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+
| 37      | Project - Final Work Day                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
+---------+----------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+
| 38      | GR4                                                      | Study! Practice!                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          | -   [**Block 4 NotebookLM Study Guide**](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/db6bd3ca-9bd5-40b5-a427-d2406a69f32f)                                                                                                        |                                       |
|         |                                                          | -   GR4 will take place on Monday 4 May (T38) during the common GR period, starting at 0630                                                                                                                                  |                                       |
|         |                                                          | -   There will be no regular class on M38/T38                                                                                                                                                                                |                                       |
+---------+----------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+
| 39      | ANOVA                                                    | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -   Project Group Task #4             |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 22 Inference for comparing many means from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                                          | -   Group Member Evaluation (Final)   |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 39](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/23181388-f7ad-4050-ab94-4adeb7af485a)                                                                                                               | -   Course Participation Form (Final) |
+---------+----------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+
| 40      |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | -   Post-course AI Questionnaire      |
+---------+----------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+
| 41      | Chi-squared tests                                        | -   READ:                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -   HW9 Concept Check                 |
|         |                                                          |     -   Chapter 18 Inference for two-way tables from *Introduction to Modern Statistics (2e)*                                                                                                                                |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   UPDATED: Chapter 6 Inference for categorical data from *OpenIntro Statistics*                                                                                                                                        |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Section 6.3 Testing for Goodness of Fit using Chi-square                                                                                                                                                         |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |         -   Section 6.4 Testing for Independence in Two-way Tables                                                                                                                                                           |                                       |
|         |                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                       |
|         |                                                          |     -   REMOVED: Interactive Tutorial                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                       |
|         |                                                          | -   [Reading Guide for Lesson 40](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/8bd7de0c-d2d3-4fe8-9edc-6d0d34b428b0)                                                                                                               |                                       |
+---------+----------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+
